name: screen-guardian
description: Ultra-light compatibility-first AI screen access with fallback adapters.

interface.shortDescription: Ultra-light AI screen access without forced upgrades.
interface.longDescription: Screen Guardian is freedom-preserving capability infrastructure for personal AI. This release is the ultra-light foundation for a planned Lightweight, Practical, and Heavy model family, expanding local visual access while keeping compatibility fallbacks, local control, and low dependency pressure.
